description:
Skin-Friendly Soft Velvet Fabric: Crafted from skin-friendly, ultra-soft velvet fabric, it's machine-washable for your convenience. Filled with highly comfortable elastic foam, it provides robust support, enveloping your back, arms, neck, and shoulders in ultimate comfort.

Organized Living: 2 convenient storage pockets keep your remote, phone, and magazines neatly organized, ensuring a tidy and clutter-free home environment.

Versatile Head Pillows: Equipped with a sleek metal zipper, the removable cloth makes washing a breeze, ensuring a fresh and hygienic home environment and easily splits into twohead pillows, giving you the flexibility to choose exactly what you need for ultimate comfort and support.

Ergonomic Design: The head, shoulder, and back curve design conforms to your body's natural shape, relieving pressure and pain from prolonged sitting while promoting correct posture.
